messages.content: You must return JSON only. ALL fields in the schema must be present, even if null or empty.

Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":38,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"delivery driver","city_of_living":"Lecce","employment_status":"self-employed","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"no formal education","parent_2":"master's degree"},"current_marital_status":"divorced","children":1,"migration_status":"native-born Italian","psychological_feature":"anxious","religious_beliefs":"Christianity","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media","hobbies":["yoga","painting","rock climbing"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":7,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":91,"level":"high"},"extraversion":{"score":70,"level":"high"},"agreeableness":{"score":84,"level":"high"},"neuroticism":{"score":80,"level":"high"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}
